query:
SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE overdue AND concurrency_gated_at IS NULL)
                           AS ungated_count,
                       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE overdue AND concurrency_gated_at IS NOT NULL)
                           AS gated_count,
                       MIN(scheduled_for) FILTER (WHERE overdue AND concurrency_gated_at IS NULL)
                           AS oldest_ungated,
                       MIN(scheduled_for) FILTER (WHERE overdue) AS oldest_overdue,
                       MAX(concurrency_gated_at) AS newest_mark
                FROM (
                    SELECT scheduled_for, concurrency_gated_at,
                           scheduled_for <= NOW() - $2::interval AS overdue
                    FROM v2_job_queue
                    WHERE tag = $1 AND running = false
                ) t
